data.title: Update CLAUDE.md and replan-observability contract for relates_to drift detection
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description

Update project documentation to reflect the new relates_to drift detection and brainstorm Part C link suggestion capabilities.

### Files to Update
1. CLAUDE.md — Add mentions of relates_to drift detection in the sprint-drift-check.sh description and the REPLAN_TRIGGER types
2. plugins/dso/docs/contracts/replan-observability.md — Add relates_to as a drift sub-type with example payload

### Constraints
- CLAUDE.md is a safeguard file — authorized by task-level instructions
- Keep additions concise and factual
- Follow existing documentation patterns

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions relates_to drift detection
  Verify: grep -q "relates_to.*drift\|RELATES_TO_DRIFT" CLAUDE.md
- [ ] Replan-observability contract mentions relates_to
  Verify: grep -q "relates_to" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/replan-observability.md
